reviews.review_description: Has 32 levels so much fun to play,levels look really good has unique levels it’s like liminality but better. Playermodel looks cool and it’s multiplayer. Owner updates game almost every week constantly. And has working servers and hi menus which are different from most games. Will play again after this review
lwk its the best backrooms gtag movement, These devs got a future bro holy peak!!

The update did change some stuff so it wasnt as similar as fa3, but their still could be some more changes 100% , but thanks for listening to feedback and keep improving the game like example making your hands stick less to the ground in certain levels like timeless airport.

developer_response.body: Thanks for editing your review and I appreciate the feedback. I understand that it was somewhat similar to FA3 like 2 updates ago but the game is completely different now and I would appreciate it if you would edit your review to become 5 stars as it is affecting our overall rating. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: At first it may seem weird but it’s so good man you need to play with friends, the only not bad thing was the flashlight but everything is so good man the entity’s the levels the feeling it’s so goated man def would recommend

This game is so fun to play with other people the game is super well made and I feel like this will get popular soon me and friend Chill had so much fun playing this game I would recommend you get it and the owner is also a W so get the game it is peak 👍
My friends Ultima made this amazing game and I love playing it every day ultima this gave blessed my eyes when playing it with you and our friends
He copied the game facility apes 3

developer_response.body: It is not a copy no idea what you are talking about.

reviews.review_title: The best game i played in a long time
reviews.review_description: Now I know what your thinking facility apes is better well i have not played it  this is LIKE that game but free if I play facility apes and If i like it yes it would be the second best one
